waves.name: P0 Implementations
waves.note: T-08 from Wave 3 can overlap since it only depends on T-04

waves.name: Integration + Re-exports
waves.note: Integration gate — modifies all index.ts files

tasks.title: Add AgentLoopStatus type and status getter to AgentLoop
tasks.description: Prerequisite. Add AgentLoopStatus type to core/types.ts. Add _status field, status getter, transitions in agent-loop.ts. Include test file.

tasks.title: Add Pool, Handoff, Boundary types to orchestration/types.ts
tasks.description: Pure type additions for agent-pool, handoff, and context-boundary interfaces.

tasks.title: Add Checkpoint types to context/types.ts
tasks.description: Pure type additions for checkpoint manager interfaces.

tasks.title: Add FailureTaxonomy and CacheMonitor types to observe/types.ts
tasks.description: Pure type additions for failure taxonomy and cache monitor interfaces.

tasks.title: Implement AgentPool + tests
tasks.description: Create agent-pool.ts. Factory-based pool with sync acquire, lazy warm-up, idle timeout, max age rotation. TDD: tests first.

tasks.title: Implement Handoff Protocol + tests
tasks.description: Create handoff.ts. Structured messaging layer on orchestrator. JSON prefix serialization. TDD: tests first.

tasks.title: Implement Checkpoint Manager + tests
tasks.description: Create checkpoint.ts. Sync in-memory storage, shallow copy, auto-prune. TDD: tests first.

tasks.title: Implement FailureTaxonomy + CacheMonitor + tests
tasks.description: Create failure-taxonomy.ts (5 detectors on Trace objects) and cache-monitor.ts (running aggregates). TDD: tests first.

tasks.title: Implement ContextBoundary + update all index.ts re-exports
tasks.description: Create context-boundary.ts. Prefix ACL, violation tracking. Update orchestration/index.ts, context/index.ts, observe/index.ts with all new re-exports. Integration gate.
